original_reasoning: حرث belongs to tilling and agricultural activation, and 'chaff holder' stays in the same farming-material domain with a tool/container drift.
Breaking earth or dry matter can yield heaps or mounds; the bridge from broken material to piled mass is plausible.
مجال العين والاستشراف يلامس معنى الوضوح المباشر، لكن الصلة غير مطابقة.

راشح is one being prepared or qualified; Greek approach can be the action-side of moving toward entry or affiliation.
The Arabic gloss carries fortress and royal-place value, and the Greek lemma is also a place-name; place continuity is plausible.
Arabic رمطه ‘to fault, blame’ can sit near lamentation in the social register of reproach and grief; the chain is plausible but not direct.
Arabic inflating a container plausibly connects to reception or receiving as a result state.
